name: saguaro-agent
description: Durable workflow, memory, and knowledge foundations for AI coding agents.

scripts.lint: pnpm -r lint && node scripts/lint-workflow-yaml.mjs && node scripts/lint-thin-loop-skills.mjs
scripts.test: pnpm -r test && node scripts/test-lint-workflow-yaml.mjs && node scripts/test-lint-thin-loop-skills.mjs && node scripts/test-shims.mjs && node scripts/test-model-tiers.mjs && node scripts/lint-workflow-yaml.mjs && node scripts/lint-thin-loop-skills.mjs
